label: New
items: AI plants now auto-update over time — a yellow chip appears on a plant card when there's new care info to review.
Click 'Refresh Care Guide' on any AI plant to pull in the latest info and see which fields changed.
Edited an AI plant's care guide? A new 'Revert Care Guide' button rolls back to the latest auto-updating version.
Plant search results now show an 'In your shed' badge so you don't accidentally add the same plant twice.

label: Improved
items: AI care guides are no longer regenerated wastefully — only when there's something genuinely new to learn.
Care guide updates only flag the fields you can actually see in the form (no more confusing 'maintenance changed' notices).
Refresh now keeps the plant modal open and highlights the just-changed fields in place — no more re-opening to find what moved.
Rate-limit messages now tell you exactly when you can try again (e.g. 'You can refresh this plant once per minute. Try again in 30s').
